svg.title: Vertex Metals order process with four-eyes verification gates
svg.desc: End-to-end order process showing hard and soft four-eyes verification gates at PO translation, supplier PO issue, pre-shipment QC, and invoice raising. Also shows correct N+15 customer payment terms and N+30 supplier payment, giving a 15-day positive cash float.

g.text: Hard gate — blocks progress until second user approves
Soft gate — signed off, audit-logged, flow continues
